headline: Dimon, Solomon to Meet With Mamdani as Mayor Pushes Higher Taxes
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Zohran Mamdani was set to hold individual meetings with Jamie Dimon, chief executive officer at JPMorgan Chase & Co., and Goldman Sachs Group Inc. CEO David Solomon, as New York City’s democratic socialist mayor seeks to build relations with the business community.
